meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2013 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2013 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, event entries, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.
2013 source pages are historical official result PDFs; program, outline, entry roster, schedule, live速報, and YouTube links were not promoted unless separately confirmed.
2026-06-30 refresh: normalized sourceSummary flags to the newer event-index candidate shape without changing event or athlete data.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not create athlete histories from this file without row-level verification.
Equipped/open, no-gear/classic, powerlifting, and bench-only rows must remain distinct when a future importer reads this source.
Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.

Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.
